mapper.select: SELECT s.store_name, u.name as ownerName, s.business_hours, s.min_price, s.store_pic, s.holiday, s.state, s.location, s.detail_location, s.created_at, s.notice, s.business_number, s.store_tel, s.rating_avg, s.rating_count, s.order_count FROM store s JOIN user u ON s.owner_id = u.user_no WHERE s.store_id = #{id}

SELECT m.menu_id, c.category AS categoryName, m.name AS menuName, m.price, m.menu_pic, m.menu_info, m.soldout FROM menu_category c JOIN menu m ON c.category_id = m.category_id WHERE c.store_id = #{id} ORDER BY c.category_order ASC, m.menu_order ASC

SELECT s.store_id AS id, s.store_name AS name, s.min_price AS min, s.rating_avg AS avg, s.rating_count AS sum, s.order_count AS count, s.store_pic AS pic FROM likedstore l JOIN store s ON l.store_id = s.store_id WHERE l.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY l.created_at DESC LIMIT #{startIdx}, #{size}

SELECT distinct s.store_id id, s.store_name name, s.store_pic pic FROM store s JOIN store_category sc ON s.store_id = sc.store_id LEFT JOIN menu m ON m.category_id = sc.category_id LEFT JOIN category c ON c.category_id = sc.category_id
m.name LIKE concat('%', #{searchText}, '%') OR s.store_name LIKE concat('%', #{searchText}, '%') OR c.category_name LIKE concat('%', #{searchText}, '%')
ORDER BY s.store_name DESC
